id: import
title: "Import a local file as a managed asset."

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Import a local file as a managed asset."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/assets/import"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Copies the file to `~/.homunculus/assets/`, registers it in the
asset registry, and persists the record in the database.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./import.StatusCodes.json")}
>
